questions.text: If you insert 10 values into an empty BST in strictly increasing order, what is the height of the resulting tree (counting edges from the root, so a single-node tree has height 0)?
questions.explanation: Every insertion after the first is bigger than every value already in the tree, so it is always attached as the right child of the current rightmost node. The result is a single chain of 10 nodes, which has 9 edges from root to the deepest (last-inserted) node.
